channel.title: Projects on Steen Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Steen Lab

item.title: Extracellular Enzymes
item.description: Geochemistry and microbial ecology of extracellular enzymes in aquatic environments

item.title: Subsurface Enzymes & Community Evolution
item.description: Analyzing enzyme structure in subsurface microbes to understand deep-biosphere community assembly

item.title: Bioinformatic Meta-Analyses
item.description: Mining public sequence databases to reveal hidden patterns across all microbial life

item.title: Thawing Permafrost
item.description: Investigating carbon cycling in Arctic ecosystems as permafrost thaws due to climate change

item.title: Outreach & Science Communication
item.description: Making geomicrobiology accessible and inspiring the next generation of scientists
